name: Coconut Rum & Pineapple Juice
description: A tropical highball of BACARDÍ Coconut rum and pineapple juice served over ice. The tropical combination of light BACARDÍ Coconut rum and fresh pineapple over ice demands your attention. It's a classy alternative to the creamy richness of a Piña Colada. Kick off your flip flops and relax with a BACARDÍ Coconut & Pineapple.
recipe_steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Coconut and pineapple juice.
Garnish with a few pineapple slices cut in triangles.
searchable_text: Coconut Rum & Pineapple Juice main rum BACARDÍ Coconut rum A tropical highball of BACARDÍ Coconut rum and pineapple juice served over ice. The tropical combination of light BACARDÍ Coconut rum and fresh pineapple over ice demands your attention. It's a classy alternative to the creamy richness of a Piña Colada. Kick off your flip flops and relax with a BACARDÍ Coconut & Pineapple. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Coconut rum, 150 ml pineapple juice recipe steps Fill a highball glass with ice. Pour in the BACARDÍ Coconut and pineapple juice. Mix well. Garnish with a few pineapple slices cut in triangles.
